inputsClass.name: set1
inputsClass.rawdescription: Icon buttons for the first group (icon mode).
inputsClass.description: Icon buttons for the first group (icon mode).

inputsClass.name: set2
inputsClass.rawdescription: Icon buttons for the second group (icon mode).
inputsClass.description: Icon buttons for the second group (icon mode).

inputsClass.name: set3
inputsClass.rawdescription: Icon buttons for the third group (icon mode).
inputsClass.description: Icon buttons for the third group (icon mode).

inputsClass.name: showKebabMenu
inputsClass.rawdescription: Whether to show the trailing kebab menu.
inputsClass.description: Whether to show the trailing kebab menu.

inputsClass.name: showSet2
inputsClass.rawdescription: Whether to show the middle set.

inputsClass.name: showSet3
inputsClass.rawdescription: Whether to show the right-hand set.

inputsClass.name: size
inputsClass.rawdescription: Size preset that controls spacing; mirrors the design spec (XS by default).
inputsClass.description: Size preset that controls spacing; mirrors the design spec (XS by default).

inputsClass.name: textSet1
inputsClass.rawdescription: Text buttons for the first group (text mode).
inputsClass.description: Text buttons for the first group (text mode).

inputsClass.name: textSet2
inputsClass.rawdescription: Text buttons for the second group (text mode).
inputsClass.description: Text buttons for the second group (text mode).

inputsClass.name: textSet3
inputsClass.rawdescription: Text buttons for the third group (text mode).
inputsClass.description: Text buttons for the third group (text mode).

inputsClass.name: type
inputsClass.rawdescription: Visual style for the bar – "icon" or "text".

getSignature.name: buttonSize
getSignature.rawdescription: Map ActionBar size to ButtonComponent size (text variant starts from S).
getSignature.description: Map ActionBar size to ButtonComponent size (text variant starts from S).

components.name: ButtonComponent

inputsClass.name: leftIconSet
inputsClass.rawdescription: Icon set for left icon: 'material' (default) or 'asset' (assets/icons/<leftIconName>.svg).

inputsClass.name: leftIconSrc
inputsClass.rawdescription: Custom left icon URL. When set, overrides leftIconName/leftIconSet (use for external or custom SVGs).
inputsClass.description: Custom left icon URL. When set, overrides leftIconName/leftIconSet (use for external or custom SVGs).

inputsClass.name: rightIconSet
inputsClass.rawdescription: Icon set for right icon: 'material' (default) or 'asset'.

inputsClass.name: rightIconSrc
inputsClass.rawdescription: Custom right icon URL. When set, overrides rightIconName/rightIconSet.
inputsClass.description: Custom right icon URL. When set, overrides rightIconName/rightIconSet.

components.name: HeaderComponent
components.template: Acme
components.sourceCode:
import { Component, Input, Output, EventEmitter } from '@angular/core'; import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common'; import { ButtonComponent } from '../Buttons/button.component'; import type { User } from '../user'; @Component({ selector: 'AppCore-header', standalone: true, imports: [CommonModule, ButtonComponent], template: `

Acme

`, styleUrls: ['./header.scss'], }) export class HeaderComponent { @Input() user: User | null = null; @Output() onLogin = new EventEmitter(); @Output() onLogout = new EventEmitter(); @Output() onCreateAccount = new EventEmitter(); }

components.name: IconComponent

inputsClass.name: icon
inputsClass.rawdescription: Icon name: for Material use names like "add", "search", "arrow_forward"; for asset use file name without .svg (e.g. "icon-search").
inputsClass.description: Icon name: for Material use names like "add", "search", "arrow_forward"; for asset use file name without .svg (e.g. "icon-search").

inputsClass.name: iconSet
inputsClass.rawdescription:
'material' = Material Symbols Rounded (default); 'asset' = SVG from assets/icons/
When using iconSet="material", the host app must load the font, e.g. in index.html:
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Rounded:opsz,wght,FILL,GRAD@20..48,100..700,0..1,-50..200" rel="stylesheet">
inputsClass.description: 'material' = Material Symbols Rounded (default); 'asset' = SVG from assets/icons/ When using iconSet="material", the host app must load the font, e.g. in index.html:

inputsClass.name: src
inputsClass.rawdescription:
Custom icon URL. When set, this is used as the img src and icon/iconSet are ignored.
Use for fully custom icons passed from outside (e.g. CDN, data URL, or app asset path).
inputsClass.description: Custom icon URL. When set, this is used as the img src and icon/iconSet are ignored. Use for fully custom icons passed from outside (e.g. CDN, data URL, or app asset path).

getSignature.name: materialIconName
getSignature.rawdescription: Material Symbol name: strip "icon-" prefix so "icon-add" and "add" both work
getSignature.description: Material Symbol name: strip "icon-" prefix so "icon-add" and "add" both work

variables.name: AssetIcons
variables.rawdescription: Asset icons: use SVG files from assets/icons/ (e.g. "my-icon" → assets/icons/my-icon.svg).
variables.description: Asset icons: use SVG files from assets/icons/ (e.g. "my-icon" → assets/icons/my-icon.svg).

variables.name: CustomIconFromUrl
variables.rawdescription: Custom icon from URL: pass any image URL (e.g. CDN, app asset, or data URL).
variables.description: Custom icon from URL: pass any image URL (e.g. CDN, app asset, or data URL).
